list.emptyDescription: Create an API key to authenticate programmatic access to the Ayunis API.

createDialog.title: Create API Key
createDialog.description: Generate a new API key for programmatic access. The full key will only be shown once.
createDialog.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters
createDialog.expiresAtHelper: Leave empty for a key that never expires.
createDialog.expiresInPast: Expiration date must be in the future

revealDialog.title: Your new API key
revealDialog.description: Copy this key now and store it somewhere secure. For your protection, this is the only time it will be shown.
revealDialog.warning: After closing this dialog, the full key cannot be retrieved.

createApiKey.expirationInPast: Expiration date must be in the future

revokeApiKey.title: Revoke API key
revokeApiKey.description: Are you sure you want to revoke "{{name}}"? Any tools using this key will stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.
